info.title: Klaviyo API
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
Get all profiles in an account. Profiles can be sorted by the following fields in ascending and descending order: `id`, `created`, `updated`, `email`, `subscriptions.email.marketing.suppression.timestamp`, `subscriptions.email.marketing.list_suppressions.timestamp` Use the `additional-fields` parameter to include subscriptions and predictive analytics data in your response.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m`

Rate limits when using the `additional-fields[profile]=predictive_analytics` parameter in your API request:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m`

To learn more about how the `additional-fields` parameter impacts rate limits, check out our [Rate limits, status codes, and errors](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/docs/rate_limits_and_error_handling) guide. **Scopes:** `profiles:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_profiles.json)

parameters.name: additional-fields[profile]
parameters.description: Request additional fields not included by default in the response. Supported values: 'subscriptions', 'predictive_analytics'

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`id`: `any`, `equals`
`email`: `any`, `equals`
`phone_number`: `any`, `equals`
`external_id`: `any`, `equals`
`_kx`: `equals`
`created`: `greater-than`, `less-than`
`updated`: `greater-than`, `less-than`
`subscriptions.email.marketing.list_suppressions.reason`: `equals`
`subscriptions.email.marketing.list_suppressions.timestamp`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`subscriptions.email.marketing.list_suppressions.list_id`: `equals`
`subscriptions.email.marketing.suppression.reason`: `equals`
`subscriptions.email.marketing.suppression.timestamp`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`

device_id.description: Relatively stable ID for the device. Will update on app uninstall and reinstall

klaviyo_sdk.description: The name of the SDK used to create the push token.

sdk_version.description: The version of the SDK used to create the push token

os_name.description: The name of the operating system on the device.

os_version.description: The version of the operating system on the device

app_name.description: The name of the app that created the push token

app_version.description: The version of the app that created the push token

app_build.description: The build of the app that created the push token

app_id.description: The ID of the app that created the push token

environment.description: The environment in which the push token was created

can_receive_email_marketing.description: Whether or not this profile has implicit consent to receive email marketing. True if it does profile does not have any global suppressions.

consent.description: The consent status for email marketing.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for email marketing, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

last_updated.description: The timestamp when a field on the email marketing object was last modified.

method.description: The method by which the profile was subscribed to email marketing.

method_detail.description: Additional details about the method by which the profile was subscribed to email marketing. This may be empty if no details were provided.

custom_method_detail.description: Additional detail provided by the caller when the profile was subscribed. This may be empty if no details were provided.

double_optin.description: Whether the profile was subscribed to email marketing using a double opt-in.

suppression.description: The global email marketing suppression for this profile.

list_suppressions.description: The list suppressions for this profile.

list_id.description: The ID of list to which the suppression applies.

reason.description: The reason the profile was suppressed from the list.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the profile was suppressed from the list, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

reason.description: The reason the profile was suppressed.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the profile was suppressed, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

historic_clv.description: Total value of all historically placed orders

predicted_clv.description: Predicted value of all placed orders in the next 365 days

total_clv.description: Sum of historic and predicted CLV

predicted_number_of_orders.description: Predicted number of placed orders in the next 365 days

average_days_between_orders.description: Average number of days between orders (None if only one order has been placed)

expected_date_of_next_order.description: Expected date of next order, as calculated at the time of their most recent order

ranked_channel_affinity.description: List of channels ranked by their predicted effectiveness for this profile, with the best channel being listed first at index 0

items.description: Enum for channel name return values used in the V3 API for channel affinity for the field `ranked_channel_affinity`.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate. We recommend providing a precision of four decimal places.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate. We recommend providing a precision of four decimal places.

region.description: Region within a country, such as state or province

timezone.description: Time zone name. We recommend using time zones from the IANA Time Zone Database.

id.description: Primary key that uniquely identifies this profile. Generated by Klaviyo.

phone_number.description: Individual's phone number in E.164 format

external_id.description: A unique identifier used by customers to associate Klaviyo profiles with profiles in an external system, such as a point-of-sale system. Format varies based on the external system.

organization.description: Name of the company or organization within the company for whom the individual works

locale.description: The locale of the profile, in the IETF BCP 47 language tag format like (ISO 639-1/2)-(ISO 3166 alpha-2)

image.description: URL pointing to the location of a profile image

created.description: Date and time when the profile was created, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

updated.description: Date and time when the profile was last updated, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

last_event_date.description: Date and time of the most recent event the triggered an update to the profile, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

properties.description: An object containing key/value pairs for any custom properties assigned to this profile

can_receive_push_marketing.description: Whether or not this profile is subscribed to receive mobile push.

consent.description: The consent status for mobile push marketing.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when the consent was last changed, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

created.description: The time at which the token was created

enablement_status.description: The enablement status of the push token

platform.description: The platform of the push token('ios', 'android')

vendor.description: The vendor of the push token('APNs', 'FCM')

background.description: The background state of the push token

recorded_date.description: The date the push token was recorded

id.description: The profile associated with the push token

can_receive_sms_marketing.description: Whether or not this profile is subscribed to receive SMS marketing.

consent.description: The consent status for SMS marketing.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for SMS marketing, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

method.description: The method by which the profile was subscribed to SMS marketing.

method_detail.description: Additional details about the method which the profile was subscribed to SMS marketing. This may be empty if no details were provided.

last_updated.description: The timestamp when the SMS consent record was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

can_receive_sms_transactional.description: Whether or not this profile is subscribed to receive transactional SMS.

consent.description: The consent status for SMS Transactional.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for Transactional SMS messaging , in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

method.description: The method by which the profile was subscribed to Transactional SMS messaging .

method_detail.description: Additional details about the method which the profile was subscribed to Transactional SMS messaging. This may be empty if no details were provided.

last_updated.description: The timestamp when the SMS consent record was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

consent.description: The consent status for the channel.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for the channel, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

last_updated.description: The timestamp when the channel was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

created_timestamp.description: The timestamp when the channel was created, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

metadata.description: Channel-specific metadata containing additional information about the permission.

can_receive.description: Whether the profile can receive messages on this channel.

valid_until.description: Optional expiration date for the permission, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

phone_number.description: Phone number to which the consent was granted for.

consent.description: The consent status for the channel.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for the channel, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

last_updated.description: The timestamp when the channel was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

created_timestamp.description: The timestamp when the channel was created, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

metadata.description: Channel-specific metadata containing additional information about the permission.

can_receive.description: Whether the profile can receive messages on this channel.

valid_until.description: Optional expiration date for the permission, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

phone_number.description: Phone number to which the consent was granted for.

consent.description: The consent status for the channel.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for the channel, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

last_updated.description: The timestamp when the channel was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

created_timestamp.description: The timestamp when the channel was created, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

metadata.description: Channel-specific metadata containing additional information about the permission.

can_receive.description: Whether the profile can receive messages on this channel.

valid_until.description: Optional expiration date for the permission, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

phone_number.description: Phone number to which the consent was granted for.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#authentication
